title: ambrosina spirialis
intro: Ambrosina spirialis, also known as the creeping Jenny, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ambrosina spirialis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Ambrosina spirialis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues due to its medicinal properties.
